# Pick My School

> Leading School ERP Management Software to streamline institution administration with AI-driven insights.

Welcome to Pick My School. This site provides information on our cloud-based ERP solution designed for educational institutions.

## Core ERP Modules
- **Student Information System:** Profiles, academic records, and documentation.
- **Attendance Management:** Automated daily attendance with AI-driven reporting.
- **Examination & Grading:** Digital exam scheduling, results, and gradebook management.
- **Fee Management:** Online collections, invoice generation, and financial analytics.
- **Hostel & Transport:** Detailed management for residential services and routing.
- **Digital Library:** Resource management for institutional library systems.
- **Faculty Management:** Staff profiles, payroll, and class assignment synchronization.

## Key Navigation Links
- [Home](index.html): Platform overview and value proposition.
- [School ERP](school.html): Deep-dive into K-12 specific institutional tools.
- [Features](features.html): Comprehensive list of all available global ERP features.
- [About Us](about.html): Our mission, values, and company history.
- [Contact Us](contact.html): Office locations, support desk, and demo requests.

## Deployment & Technical Details
- **Architecture:** Cloud-scalable SaaS platform.
- **Technology Focus:** AI-driven analytics and educational automation.
- **Publisher:** Patterns Infotech Pvt Ltd.
- **Operational Region:** Global (Headquartered in Hyderabad, India).

For detailed documentation or specialized integration requests, please reach out via our [Contact Page](contact.html).
